nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: Andean gull
nodes.summary: Andean gull（Andean gull，学名 Chroicocephalus serranus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "The species is probably vulnerable, with no large populations...breeding areas are in remote high-altitude lakes but many are increasingly subject to agricultural pressure and human disturbance."
